page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: MSnbase is an R/Bioconductor package that provides infrastructure for plotting, manipulation and processing mass spectrometry and proteomics data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Basic plotting, data manipulation and processing of MS-based Proteomics data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Basic plotting, data manipulation and processing of MS-based Proteomics data.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: MSnbase provides infrastructure for manipulation, processing and visualisation of mass spectrometry and proteomics data, ranging from raw to quantitative and annotated data.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Basic plotting, data manipulation and processing of MS-based Proteomics data.
